note_text: Wound note - Leftplantar. Meas 3.1x1.7x0.3cm. None serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 70% gran, 30% slough. Periwound macerated. Foam dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Nguyen notified.

  Wound bed: 78% slough, 22% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: none. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left plantar — improving.
